title: DEBOER SUMMER CAMP - 211info
text: ASHLAND FAMILY YMCA DEBOER SUMMER CAMP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of camps. Programs include traditional overnight and mini overnight camps, backpacking adventures, and more. The camp provides a safe, nurturing, and exciting environment for children and youth to discover, learn, and grow. 540 YMCA Way Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Ages 6-17 Hours: Varies Email (541) 482-9622 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 482-9622 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies DOCUMENTS: Registration forms and health information LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 5am-9pm, Saturday 8am-6pm, Sunday 9am-4pm Services: Camps Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - PRESCHOOL INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - AFTER SCHOOL CARE LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - GYMNASTICS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - SCHOOL’S OUT DAYS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - SWIMMING LESSONS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - YOUTH SPORTS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
